title: How to build an AI Agent and MCP Server (step-by-step)
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to build AI agents using Model Context Protocol (MCP), an open standard that enables AI agents to connect securely with live data and external tools. The video walks through connecting Google Trends with a blog writing AI agent using Google's Agent Development Kit.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building an AI agent and an MCP server step by step, using Model Context Protocol, an open standard that lets agents connect securely to live data and external tools. The demonstration wires Google Trends into a blog writing agent built with Google's Agent Development Kit. The takeaway is a concrete pattern for tool use: an agent pulling real-time data through an MCP connection to inform its output.
